name: codex-build
description: Orchestrator drives, Codex codes - execute an approved plan one task at a time with a test gate before every commit and exactly one PR at the end

interface.shortDescription: Execute an approved plan with Codex as the coder — one task per commit, one PR.
interface.longDescription: Your agent orchestrates: it sequences an approved plan, briefs OpenAI Codex to write all the product code, reviews every diff, runs the test gate before each commit, commits one task at a time, and opens exactly one PR at the end.
defaultPrompt: You orchestrate, Codex codes — execute the approved plan.
Have Codex build this bead-by-bead and open one PR.
